title: E-lib
description: The local library for Forge modifications
body:
This mod for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1 allows you to integrate Discord into the
 game, so you can receive notifications about server events directly in Discord, write messages from the game to the Discord channel, and see who is in the Discord channel.
 Discord, write messages from the game to the Discord channel, and see who is online. 
of your friends are online. Now you can argue with creepers in the 
voice chat or send memes directly from the mine!
